notes: Compound noun from 'Gen' (gene) + 'Test' (test). Used in medical and forensic contexts.

sentences.german: Der Arzt empfahl einen Gentest, um das Risiko für Erbkrankheiten zu bestimmen.
sentences.english: The doctor recommended a genetic test to determine the risk of hereditary diseases.

sentences.german: Die Ergebnisse des Gentests lagen nach zwei Wochen vor.
sentences.english: The results of the genetic test were available after two weeks.
